response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of proven work with routing tiles, real-time traffic integration, or low-latency geospatial processing raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated systems-level coding in DLang and low-latency backend development
Strong track record of learning new technologies and contributing across stacks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile generation, map data optimization, or geospatial data pipelines
Minimal evidence of distributed systems work (fault tolerance, consistency, service discovery) in production
